title: citrus × nobilis subf. benikoji
intro: Citrus × nobilis subf. benikoji is a rare and unique citrus plant that is a natural hybrid of Poncirus and Citrus, resulting in a fruit with characteristics of both species. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its high concentration of flavonoids and limonoids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus × nobilis subf. benikoji include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit antibacterial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote digestive health, reduce stress, and support immune function.
